title: 15 Minute Best Fried Rice
ingredients: ["450g 90%ground beef", "350mL Minute rice", "1 can peas", "2 Tbsp ketchup", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/2 tspground onions", "1/2 tsp hot sauce", "300mL water"]
directions: ["In large frying pan, brown ground beef on high heat for 5 minutes. Then drain. Bring salt and water to a boil in separate pot. Add rice. Stir and cover. Remove from heat for 5", "minutes. Add peas, ketchup, onion, hot sauce and a pinch of salt to ground beef in frying pan and heat on low setting for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, then covering. Add rice and stir thoroughly and serve hot. Makes 4 ample servings."]

title: 15 Minute Chicken And Rice Dinner

directions: ["Heat oil in skillet. Add chicken and cook until browned. Remove chicken."]

title: 15 Minute Mexicali Supper

directions: ["Mash corned beef and potatoes.", "Add onion and seasonings. Cook 15 minutes.", "Serve with greens and salad."]

title: 15 Minutes Chicken And Rice Dinner
ingredients: ["4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves", "1 can cream of chicken soup", "1/4 tsp paprika", "1/4 tsp pepper", "470mL Minute white rice (uncooked)", "470mL fresh or frozen broccoli florets", "350mL water"]
directions: ["Heat 1 tablespoon oil in skillet. Add chicken. Cook until browned. Remove chicken from skillet. Add soup, 350 mL water, paprika and pepper. Stir; heat to a boil. Stir in rice and broccoli. Top with chicken. Season chicken with additional paprika and pepper. Cover; cook on low heat 5 minutes or until broccoli and rice are cooked through."]

title: 2 Quick Pastas

directions: ["No. 2:", "Change olive oil to butter.", "Add shredded Mozzarella or Monterey Jack cheese.", "Add heavy cream (optional)."]

title: 2 Step Meal
ingredients: ["4 cans vegetable beef soup", "Minute rice"]
directions: ["Cook vegetable beef soup with no water added until hot.", "Cook rice.", "Serve tomato over rice.", "Time to eat."]

title: 20 Minute Tamale Pie

directions: ["Brown beef; add onion.", "Drain excess fat.", "Mix rest of ingredients, except cheese. Reduce heat, sprinkle cheese on top, cover and simmer 20 minutes.", "Serve hot with salsa.", "Makes 4 to 6 servings.", "Makes a skillet full."]

title: 25 Minute Chicken And Noodles

directions: ["Brown meat in large pan.", "Add onion soup mix, chili powder, kidney beans, water and chopped tomatoes.", "Dice potatoes and add. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.", "Serves 6."]

title: 30 Minute Creamy Macaroni

directions: ["Prepare macaroni according to package and drain.", "Combine milk and mushroom soup, mustard, pepper and vegetables.", "Boil for 10 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally.", "Turn heat off. Put in ham and cheese; stir.", "Then put all ingredients with macaroni and stir."]

directions: ["Cook bacon until crisp in heavy skillet with tight fitting lid. Remove bacon and all but 80 mL drippings.", "Add rice and brown; add onion, cook 1 minute more.", "Add other ingredients along with crumbled bacon.", "Bring to boil.", "Reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes. Makes large amount and freezes well."]

title: 30 Minute Stew

directions: ["Cover potatoes and carrots with water.", "Add onion and black pepper.", "Cook until carrots and potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.", "Add beef with gravy and bouillon.", "Heat through.", "Thicken with cornstarch mixed with a little water.", "Serve with hot biscuits."]

title: Bacon And Egg Fried Rice
ingredients: ["4 slices bacon, sliced", "2 (230g) containers thawed, frozen no cholesterol egg substitute or 8 eggs", "1/2 tsp salt", "salad oil", "1420mL cold cooked rice", "1green onion, chopped"]
directions: ["About 20 minutes before serving, in small saucepan over medium-low heat, cook bacon until browned.", "Remove to paper towels to drain.", "Meanwhile, in medium bowl, beat egg substitute or eggs and salt and set aside.", "In 12-inch skillet over medium heat in 2 tablespoons hot salad oil, gently stir rice until well coated with oil.", "Cook eggs in small amount of oil in a skillet, stirring eggs constantly, until they are set and about the size of peas.", "Then gently stir rice and eggs to mix.", "Spoon rice mixture into bowl; sprinkle with cooked bacon and green onion.", "Makes 4 servings. title: Bacon And Egg Salad

title: Easy Steak And Rice

title: Microwave Broccoli And Corn Casserole

directions: ["Mix first six ingredients together.", "Top with cheese and microwave on High for 10 minutes.", "Add crumbs.", "Microwave on High 1 minute."]

title: Microwave Broccoli Bacon Quiche
ingredients: ["4 slices bacon", "1/8 tsp lemon pepper", "1/8 tspgarlic powder", "1/4 tsp salt", "300g broccoli flowerets", "150ggrated Swiss cheese", "150g half and half", "4 eggs"]
directions: ["Place bacon on several layers of paper towels.", "Microwave 1 1/2 to 2 minutes on High or until slightly undercooked.", "Remove and set aside.", "Beat eggs with cream and cheese.", "Stir in broccoli, salt, garlic powder and lemon pepper.", "Crumble bacon. Stir half of the bacon into egg mixture.", "Pour mixture into a 9-inch glass pie plate.", "Microwave on Medium power for 4 to 6 minutes, stirring every other minute. Continue microwaving on High for 10 minutes or until eggs set.", "Allow to stand 5 minutes before serving.", "Top with remaining bacon. Garnish with sliced tomatoes. Serves 4."]

title: Microwave Broccoli Chowder

directions: ["In 2-quart microwave bowl, combine broccoli, onion and water. Cook, covered, on High for 5 to 6 minutes or until veggies are tender.", "Stir twice, breaking broccoli.", "Stir in soup, milk, cheese and pepper.", "Cook, uncovered, on High for 7 to 9 minutes, until well heated, stirring twice.", "Top each serving with chopped peanuts.", "Serves 4."]

title: Microwave Brunch Egg Casserole
ingredients: ["6 slices bacon", "6 eggs", "350mL milk", "3/4 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp prepared mustard", "1/4 tsp onion powder", "1/5 tsp pepper", "470mL croutons", "240mL shredded Cheddar cheese"]
directions: ["Microwave bacon on High between several layers of paper toweling 5 to 6 minutes or until crisp.", "Cool and crumble. Combine eggs, milk, salt, mustard, onion powder and pepper in a bowl.", "Beat well.", "Pour over croutons and cheese in a 10 x 6-inch baking dish.", "Let stand 10 minutes. Stir.", "Microwave on High 6 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times.", "Sprinkle with bacon and microwave on High an additional 1 to 2 minutes, depending on desired degree of doneness.", "Serves 4 to 6."]

title: Microwave Cabbage Rolls Italian Style
ingredients: ["8 large cabbage leaves (outer leaves)", "120mL water", "450gground chuck beef", "1 egg", "240mL Minute rice, precooked", "3 Tbsp chopped onion", "1 tsp salt", "2 (230g) cans tomato sauce", "1 Tbsp sugar", "1 tsp oregano"]
directions: ["In 3-quart casserole, place cabbage and water.", "Cover and microwave on High for 7 to 9 minutes until leaves are pliable. While cabbage is cooking, mix together ground beef, egg, rice, onion and salt.", "Divide meat mixture into 8 equal portions.", "Place one portion on each partially cooked cabbage leaf and roll meat into leaf, securing with toothpick if necessary.", "Return to 3-quart casserole, placing rolls seam side down.", "Blend tomato sauce, sugar and oregano.", "Pour over cabbage rolls.", "Cover and microwave on High 15 to 17 minutes, rotating dish half turn and basting with sauce after 9 minutes."]

title: Microwave Cashew Chicken
ingredients: ["450g chicken breast", "3 Tbsp oil", "garlic, finely chopped (to taste)", "2 Tbsp soy sauce", "1 Tbsp cooking sherry (optional)", "1 Tbsp cornstarch", "1/4 tspginger", "1green pepper or broccoli (approximately 240mL)", "120mL cashew halves"]
directions: ["Heat oil in 3-quart casserole on High for 2 to 3 minutes. Combine chicken, garlic, soy sauce, sherry, cornstarch and ginger. Put ingredients in oil and cook on High 4 to 5 minutes.", "Stir twice during the 4 to 5 minutes.", "Add green pepper (broccoli) and cashews.", "Cook, covered with plastic wrap, on High 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken and vegetables are tender.", "Stir and let stand 3 minutes before serving.", "Serve with favorite brand of rice."]

title: Microwave Cheddary Chicken

directions: ["Mix ingredients together and put in dish; place chicken on top. Cover lightly with wax paper and cook on High 15 minutes.", "Stir in rice mixture and continue cooking on High 10 minutes longer."]

title: Microwave Cheese And Bean Dip

directions: ["Mix", "soup", "and cheese in 1 quart measuring cup.", "Microwave for 3 minutes on Medium (50% power), stirring occasionally.", "Blend sour cream, onion and hot pepper.", "Heat 1 additional", "minute. (May", "take", "longer, depending on your microwave.) Serve with crackers or chips."]

title: Microwave Cheese Enchiladas
ingredients: ["10 to 12 corn tortillas (room temperature)", "80mL vegetable oil", "710mL shredded Cheddar and Monterey Jack cheese, mixed", "120mLgreen onion, chopped", "1 (170g) can black olives, chopped", "1 (280g) can enchilada sauce (mild)", "470mLgrated Cheddar cheese", "80mLgreen onion, chopped"]
directions: ["Heat oil in pie plate until very hot, about 5 to 7 minutes. Roll closed and place seam-side down in an 8 x 12-inch shallow baking dish.", "Pour enchilada sauce over top and sprinkle grated Cheddar cheese and 80 mL chopped green onion on top.", "Microwave at 80% power (Medium-high) for 13 to 15 minutes, turning dish once during cooking.", "Serves 6."]

title: Microwave Cheese Puffs

directions: ["Combine green onions with cheese and mayonnaise.", "Spread on toast rounds in 8 1/4-inch shallow baking dish.", "Heat half the rounds on Medium for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until bubbly.", "Turn baking dish once during cooking.", "Repeat with remaining puffs. title: Microwave Cheese Quesadillas

directions: ["Heat flour tortilla in microwave for 10 to 20 seconds to soften.", "Slice or grate cheese onto tortilla and add 1 tablespoon of salsa.", "Roll up and fold ends.", "Heat for", "1 minute or until cheese is melted.", "Cut into 4 even pieces."]

directions: ["Arrange crackers on napkin-lined plates.", "In bowl, microwave butter for 10 seconds to soften.", "Add cheese and blend.", "Stir in egg yolk and shrimp."]

title: Microwave Cheese Sticks

directions: ["Cream butter and cheese with mixer.", "Mix in flour, salt and pepper sauce until mixture resembles soft cookie dough.", "Turn mixture out on floured board.", "Sprinkle with flour; roll out to 1/8 inch thickness, flouring lightly as needed.", "Cut into strips 1/2 inch wide and 2 1/3 inches long.", "Line microwave baking sheet or 12 x 12-inch sheet of cardboard with waxed paper.", "Place cheese sticks on paper.", "Elevate baking sheet on roasting rack.", "Microwave at High for 3 1/2 to 5 1/2 minutes or until firm.", "Makes 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 dozen."]

title: Microwave Cheesy Chicken

title: Microwave Chex Mix

title: Microwave Chex Party Mix

title: Microwave Chicken And Dumplings

title: Microwave Chicken And Rice

title: Microwave Chicken Soup

title: Microwave Chili Cheese Dip

title: Microwave Corn On Cob

directions: ["Place corn in a Ziploc bag, with a hole punched in it.", "Cook on High for 2 minutes.", "Turn and cook 3 more minutes.", "Be very careful of steam."]

title: Microwave Corned Beef And Cabbage

directions: ["Clean and chop cabbage.", "Place it in a microwave cooking dish. Salt and pepper it.", "Sprinkle the cabbage liberally with water. Continue doing this until the cabbage is nearly done, always checking to see if it needs more water.", "When the cabbage is nearly done, add the corned beef.", "Mix well.", "Finish cooking the cabbage.", "Serve hot."]

title: Microwave Country Breakfast

directions: ["Microwave sausage and onion, uncovered, in a shallow, 2-quart casserole on High for 4 to 5 minutes, or until sausage is no longer pink.", "Stir twice during cooking.", "Remove sausage and onion from dish with slotted spoon and drain on paper towel.", "Add potatoes to the casserole with the sausage drippings and microwave, covered, until potatoes are cooked, about 5 to 6 minutes.", "Stir in 1/4 teaspoon salt and spread potatoes evenly in the dish.", "Combine eggs, milk, remaining salt and pepper in a 2-cup measure.", "Pour evenly over potatoes.", "Mix sausage mixture with thyme and sage in a small bowl and sprinkle over potatoes. Do not stir potatoes and sausage.", "Microwave, uncovered, at 50% power (Medium) until eggs are almost set, about 8 to 10 minutes. Give dish a 1/4 turn twice during cooking.", "Serves 4."]

title: Microwave Cranberry Orange Relish

title: Microwave Creole Hamburger

title: Microwave Denver Sandwiches

title: Microwave Devil Dog Sandwiches

directions: ["Onto 1 side of each slice of bread, drizzle 1/2 teaspoon oil; top each slice of bread with half of the tomato slices and 30 g of cheese.", "Sprinkle each sandwich with 1 1/2 teaspoons basil and pepper.", "Set sandwiches on microwavable plate or large paper plate; cover with wax paper and microwave on Medium-high (70%) for 2 minutes, until cheese is melted."]

title: Microwave Muffin Pizza
ingredients: ["1 English muffin", "1 to 2 tsp pizza sauce", "2 slices Mozzarella cheese", "precooked meat of choice"]
directions: ["Place sauce on muffin.", "Add cheese slices and meat.", "Place on microwave dish and cook on High for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.;", "Makes 1 after school snack."]

title: Microwave Muffin Toppers
ingredients: ["1 Tbsp butter or margarine", "1/2 tsp prepared mustard", "1 English muffin, split and toasted", "80g chopped or 2 slices cooked ham", "80g shredded cheese (Swiss, Mozzarella, Cheddar or Monterey Jack)"]
directions: ["Note: Also great with pepperoni, sausage, peppers, onions, etc."]

title: Microwave Nacho Cheese Dip
ingredients: ["470mL Velveeta cheese, cubed", "120mL salsa sauce"]
directions: ["Combine in microwave dish.", "Microwave on High for 5 minutes, stirring once after 2 minutes. Serve with chips."]

title: Microwave Nachos
ingredients: ["1 Bounty Microwave paper towel", "24 large tortilla chips", "150g shredded Monterey Jack, Cheddar or Colby cheese", "40g sliced black olives", "1 Tbsp sliced, canned or fresh seeded jalapeno pepper"]
directions: ["Place paper towel on a microwave-safe plate.", "Arrange tortilla chips on Bounty-lined plate.", "Sprinkle with cheese, olives and pepper.", "Microwave at 50% (Medium) for 2 to 5 minutes or until cheese melts, rotating plate once or twice.", "Makes 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Nachos Grande
ingredients: ["230gground, cooked hamburger, crumbled", "470mL chopped tomatoes", "1 (280g) can refried beans", "1 (230g) container sour cream", "120mL choppedgreen onions", "80mL jalapeno peppers, chopped (optional)", "120mL sliced black olives", "470mL shredded Cheddar cheese", "240mLguacamole", "1 large bag tortilla chips (your choice of brands)"]
directions: ["On large microwavable platter, start layering as follows: tortilla chips, Cheddar cheese, refried beans, hamburger, sour cream, tomatoes, green onions and black olives.", "After completing first layer of everything, begin with second layer in same order. When ingredients are gone, top with guacamole and jalapeno peppers.", "Entire platter can be heated in microwave.", "Serve immediately.", "Great party snack (but a little messy)!"]

title: Microwave New England Clam Chowder
ingredients: ["470mL cubed potatoes", "180mL thinly sliced celery", "1 medium onion, chopped", "2 (180g each) cans minced clams (reserve liquid)", "1 tsp salt", "1 tsp dried parsley flakes", "1/4 tsp dried thyme leaves", "1/4 tsp pepper", "1 medium carrot,grated", "470mL milk, divided", "60mL all-purpose flour", "3 Tbsp butter or margarine"]
directions: ["In a 2-quart casserole, combine potatoes, celery, onion, reserved clam liquid, salt, parsley, thyme and pepper.", "Mix well. Cover."]

title: Microwave One Dish Dinner
ingredients: ["1 eggplant, pared and diced", "450gground beef", "1 chopped onion", "1/8 tspgarlic powder", "1/2 tsp basil", "1/2 tsp oregeno", "450g can tomato sauce"]
directions: ["Brown meat and seasonings for 5 minutes Place eggplant in microwave dish and cover with meat mixture.", "Sprinkle with 1/2 tsp. basil and 1/2 tsp. oregano.", "Top with 450 g. can of tomato sauce and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.", "Cover and microwave on medium for 10 minutes."]

title: Microwave Oriental Beef And Tomato Casserole
ingredients: ["450g tender beef, thinly sliced", "1 clovegarlic, peeled and crushed", "1 Tbsp sugar", "2 Tbsp light soy sauce", "1 tspginger", "240mL thinly sliced celery", "240mL thinly sliced onion", "1green pepper, thinly sliced", "4 small tomatoes, peeled and cut into wedges", "1 Tbsp cornstarch", "1 Tbsp water"]
directions: ["In a deep quart microwave casserole dish, place beef.", "Heat on full power 5 minutes or until meat is no longer red.", "Drain excess liquid.", "Add garlic, soy sauce, ginger, celery, onion, green pepper and tomatoes.", "Heat on full power 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.", "In", "a small custard cup, combine cornstarch and water to make a smooth paste.", "Add cornstarch mixture to liquid in casserole.", "Heat on full power 2 minutes until mixture is thickened and smooth.", "Serves 4."]

title: Microwave Oven Meat Loaf
ingredients: ["680gground beef", "120mL canned milk", "120mL bread crumbs", "2 eggs, beaten", "1 tsp salt", "1/8 tsp black pepper", "1 small onion, chopped"]
directions: ["Mix", "all", "ingredients", "well.", "Make 6 small meat loaves. Put in", "glass baking dish.", "Cover with plastic wrap.", "Cook on High", "8 minutes.", "Drian off all fat.", "Pour one can tomato soup over meat. Cover with plastic wrap; cook 2 minutes."]

title: Microwave Overnight Tuna Casserole
ingredients: ["1 can cream of celery soup", "240mL milk", "1 (180g) can water packed tuna, drained", "240mL uncooked elbow macaroni", "240mL frozen peas", "120mL chopped onion", "240mL shredded Cheddar cheese, reserve 60mL"]
directions: ["Mix soup and milk in microwave-safe bowl.", "Stir in remaining ingredients except 60 mL cheese.", "Refrigerate overnight.", "Cover and microwave on High 15 minutes.", "Sprinkle with reserved cheese. Let stand 5 to 7 minutes until cheese melts."]

title: Microwave Parmesan Chicken
ingredients: ["1 (230g) can tomato sauce", "1 tsp Italian seasoning", "1/4 tspgarlic salt", "80mL corn flake crumbs", "60mL Parmesan cheese", "1 tsp dried parsley flakes", "2 large boneless chicken breasts (skinless)", "1 egg, beaten", "120mL shredded Mozzarella cheese", "grated Parmesan cheese"]
directions: ["Mix tomato sauce, Italian seasoning and garlic salt in a 2-cup measuring cup.", "Cover with wax paper.", "Microwave on High for 2 minutes.", "Stir.", "Reduce power to Medium for 5 minutes."]

title: Microwave Parmesan Potatoes
ingredients: ["2 Tbsp margarine", "2 or 3 medium potatoes, sliced", "50g onion, chopped", "1 clovegarlic, chopped", "80g slicedgreen pepper", "1/4 tsp salt", "1/8 tsp pepper", "40ggrated Parmesan cheese", "sprinkle of paprika"]
directions: ["Melt margarine in baking dish.", "Add potatoes, onion and garlic.", "Cover loosely with Saran Wrap and cook on Full power for 5 minutes in microwave.", "Add green pepper, salt and pepper and toss.", "Add cheese and sprinkle with paprika.", "Cook for 6 minutes or until potatoes are tender."]

title: Microwave Parslied Potatoes
ingredients: ["4 medium potatoes", "60mL water", "3 Tbsp butter or margarine", "3 to 4 Tbsp minced fresh parsley", "salt", "freshlyground pepper"]
directions: ["Peel potatoes and cut in quarters.", "Combine potatoes and water in 2-quart microproof casserole; cover.", "Cook 12 to 14 minutes on High, or until tender, stirring once during cooking time; drain. Add butter, parsley, salt and pepper.", "Stir until butter is melted.", "Serve right away while hot.", "Serves 4 to 6 people.", "Total cooking time: 12 to 14 minutes."]

title: Microwave Party Dip
ingredients: ["1 can (450g) whole tomatoes, drained and chopped", "1 can choppedgreen chilies", "450g process cheese spread, shredded", "dash of hot pepper sauce", "taco or tortilla chips"]
directions: ["Microwave on High for 7 minutes or until cheese melts, stirring every 2 minutes.", "Serve with chips."]

title: Microwave Pasta Primavera
ingredients: ["450g wide noodles, cooked", "1 head broccoli, cooked and chopped", "salt and pepper", "240mL heavy cream", "240mL Parmesan cheese", "1/2 stick margarine"]
directions: ["Microwave cream cheese and margarine on High for 5 minutes, until just to boil.", "Pour over hot broccoli and pasta."]

title: Microwave Peanuts
ingredients: ["240mL peanuts", "1 tsp cooking oil", "salt"]
directions: ["Place nuts in a single layer in a 10 x 6 x 1 3/4-inch baking dish.", "Microwave raw peanuts on High (100%) for 6 to 8 minutes. Drizzle with cooking oil and sprinkle with seasoned salt. Microwave for an additional 45 seconds to 1 minute on High (100%) or until golden brown."]

title: Microwave Perky Nachos
ingredients: ["16 large tortilla chips", "2 Tbsp chopped chilies", "2 Tbsp chopped black olives", "110g finelygrated Cheddar cheese"]
directions: ["Place a layer of tortilla chips close together on a waxed paper-lined 10-inch plate.", "Sprinkle with chopped chilies and black olives.", "Top with Cheddar cheese."]

title: Microwave Pizza Casserole
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "1 tspgarlic salt", "1 onion, chopped", "60mLgreen pepper, chopped", "240mL Mozzarella cheese", "1 can mushrooms", "1 (450g) can pizza sauce", "470mL Scruddles pasta", "90g pepperoni"]
directions: ["Microwave ground beef, garlic salt, green pepper and chopped onion covered for 6 minutes. Stir and drain off fat.", "Layer the Scruddles over meat, drain liquid from mushrooms in cup and add water to 240 mL.", "Add mushrooms, pizza sauce and mushroom liquid. Microwave for 16 minutes, covered with plastic wrap.", "Spread 240 mL Mozzarella cheese over top.", "Microwave until melted."]

title: Microwave Pizza Dip
ingredients: ["230g cream cheese", "240mL thick spaghetti sauce", "2 cans sliced mushrooms, drained", "120mL sliced black olives", "230g cooked, drained hamburger or sausage or pepperoni slices", "120mL Mozzarella cheese, shredded"]
directions: ["Spread cream cheese on bottom of 10-inch microwave-safe plate. Layer other ingredients in order given. Microwave on High 1 to 2 minutes, until cheese is melted.", "Serve with crackers."]

title: Microwave Pizza Topper
ingredients: ["1 English muffin, split and toasted", "2 Tbsp pizza sauce", "6 slices pepperoni", "2 Tbsp shredded Mozzarella cheese"]
directions: ["Spread each muffin half with pizza sauce.", "Top each with 3 slices of pepperoni and then with cheese.", "Place halves on microwave-proof plate.", "Cook on 60 for 45 to 60 seconds, or until cheese is melted.", "Let stand 2 minutes before serving.", "Makes 1 to 2 servings."]

title: Microwave Pizza Wheels
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "2 Tbsp finely chopped onion", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/4 tsp oregano", "60mL spaghetti sauce", "4 slices Mozzarella cheese, cut into strips"]
directions: ["Combine ground beef, onion, salt and 1/4 teaspoon oregano. Shape into 4 patties, rising the edge 1/4 inch to form a center well.", "In baking dish, arrange patties.", "Heat 5 1/2 minutes; drain.", "Fill center well with spaghetti sauce.", "Sprinkle with oregano; heat 1 to 2 minutes.", "Top with cheese.", "Let stand, covered, 4 minutes before serving.", "Yields 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Popcorn
ingredients: ["1 bag popcorn"]
directions: ["Put popcorn in microwave for 3 1/2 minutes."]

title: Microwave Poppycock
ingredients: ["120mL white Karo syrup", "300mL sugar", "240mL oleo", "2 qt popped popcorn"]
directions: ["Microwave on High for 11 minutes in a large bowl.", "Pour over popped corn.", "Can add nuts if desired.", "Mix well.", "Be careful, syrup is very hot.", "Spread out on cookie sheet until cool, then break up and store in airtight container."]

title: Microwave Pork Casserole
ingredients: ["2 pork steaks, cut in strips", "1 medium onion, diced", "salt and pepper", "1 clovegarlic, diced", "1 small can mushrooms, drained", "120mL diced peppers", "water", "120mL flour", "120mL butter", "linguini noodles"]
directions: ["Place pork in 2-quart glass casserole dish with salt and pepper.", "Cover with water and microwave, covered, on High for 40 minutes."]

title: Microwave Potato Casserole
ingredients: ["4 to 6 potatoes, peeled and sliced", "1 onion, sliced", "1 can cream of mushroom soup", "cheese (as desired)"]
directions: ["Alternate layers of potatoes and onion.", "Pour can of cream of mushroom soup over potatoes and onion.", "Cook for 10 minutes. Rotate dish and cook for 5 to 10 minutes, until done.", "Sprinkle with grated cheese."]

title: Microwave Potato Cheese Casserole
ingredients: ["5 to 6 large white potatoes", "1 onion, chopped fine", "1 stick butter or oleo", "3 slices American cheese"]
directions: ["Cut potatoes into small cubes.", "Add chopped onion and potato cubes to casserole dish.", "Cut butter over top.", "Microwave 45 minutes.", "Add slices of cheese to the top and microwave 15 more minutes."]

title: Microwave Potato Parsley Soup
ingredients: ["710mL peeled, cubed potatoes", "60mL chopped onion", "1/4 tsp salt", "1 (400g) can chicken broth", "1 small bunch parsley, chopped", "2 Tbsp cornstarch", "350 - 470mL milk"]
directions: ["Combine potatoes, onion, salt and broth in 2-quart casserole. Add parsley.", "Cook, covered, for 13 to 15 minutes or until potatoes are tender.", "Combine cornstarch with a small amount of cold milk; stir into potato mixture.", "Add remaining milk.", "Cook, uncovered, for about 3 minutes or until mixture comes to a boil and is piping hot.", "Stir once or twice during cooking.", "Serves 4."]

title: Microwave Potato Salad Topping
ingredients: ["120mLgreen onions, chopped", "120mL olive ol", "80mL cider vinegar", "120mL dill pickle, chopped", "1/2 tsp dried dill weed", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp pepper"]
directions: ["In 1-quart casserole place 1 tablespoon olive oil and chopped green onions, including some of green top.", "Microwave on High 1 to 3 minutes, until bright green.", "Stir in 120 mL olive oil, cider vinegar, chopped dill pickle, dill weed, salt and pepper."]

title: Microwave Potato Soup
ingredients: ["1 small onion", "3 Tbsp margarine", "710mL diced potatoes", "4 slices bacon, cooked and crumbled", "2 Tbsp flour", "470mL light cream", "1 tsp salt"]
directions: ["Place onion, margarine, potatoes and salt in a 2 1/2-quart glass casserole.", "Cover; microwave on High for 15 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.", "Blend flour and cream together; pour over potatoes and microwave on High 6 to 8 minutes, or until thickened.", "Stir occasionally.", "Top with crumbled bacon and serve."]

title: Microwave Potato Supreme
ingredients: ["8 potatoes with skins", "1/2 stick butter or Butter Buds", "Season-All", "150g shredded Cheddar cheese", "1 sliced onion (optional)"]
directions: ["Slice potatoes and onion and lay in microwavable casserole dish.", "Place pats of butter over potatoes and sprinkle Season-All over the potatoes.", "Cook in microwave at Full power for 10 minutes.", "Check for tenderness.", "Cover with cheese and cook 2 more minutes."]

title: Microwave Potato, Tomato And Onion Casserole
ingredients: ["3 potatoes", "1 (450g) can stewed tomatoes", "1 large onion, thinly sliced", "2garlic cloves, minced", "1 tsp thyme", "2 Tbsp olive oil, divided", "1/2 tsp pepper", "1/4 tsp salt", "3 Tbsp dried bread crumbs", "1 Tbsp Parmesan cheese"]
directions: ["Cook onion, garlic, thyme and 1 tablespoon oil in a 2-quart shallow dish, covered, on High for 6 minutes, stirring halfway through cooking.", "Meanwhile, peel potatoes and slice.", "Stir potatoes, tomatoes, pepper and salt into onions."]

title: Microwave Potatoes And Onions
ingredients: ["2 medium potatoes, thinly sliced", "1 large onion, sliced", "3/4 - 1 stick margarine", "salt"]
directions: ["Using a 2 qt. casserole dish, layer potatoes and onions. Slice margarine over top and sprinkle with salt. Cook about 15 minutes in microwave. Turn or stir lightly and cook 15 minutes more or until done. Time may vary."]

title: Microwave Puffy Cheese Omelet
ingredients: ["3 eggs, separated", "80mL mayonnaise", "2 Tbsp water", "2 Tbsp butter", "120mL finely shredded Cheddar cheese"]
directions: ["In largest mixer bowl beat", "egg whites at highest speed until soft peaks form.", "In", "smaller", "bowl", "using same beaters, beat yolks, mayonnaise and", "water.", "Gently", "pour", "yolk mixture over beaten whites. Fold", "together", "carefully.", "In", "9-inch pie plate microwave butter at High 1", "minute,", "swirl to coat dish. Carefully pour", "egg mixture", "into", "pie", "plate.", "Microwave", "at Medium 6 to 8 minutes, rotating dish 1/2 turn after 3 minutes, until", "set, but still glossy", "on", "top.", "Sprinkle", "cheese", "over omelet.", "Microwave 1/2 to 1 minute", "on Medium, until cheese is slightly melted. Quickly run", "spatula", "or turner around sides and bottom of dish. Fold half", "of omelet over the other half. Gently slide onto serving", "plate.", "Sprinkle", "with", "chives,", "if desired."]

title: Microwave Pumpkin Cups

directions: ["Mix all together with rotary beater.", "Pour into custard cups. Microwave on High until pumpkin starts to bubble.", "Makes 6 servings."]

title: Microwave Quiche

directions: ["Grease 9-inch pie pan or quiche dish.", "Layer meat, cheese and vegetables.", "Beat milk, mayonnaise, Bisquick and eggs for 1 minute. Pour into pan. Microwave on inverted plate on Medium-high for 18 to 20 minutes.", "Let stand 10 minutes."]

title: Microwave Quick Beef Pie
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "1/2 medium onion, chopped", "1 can tomato soup", "1/2 tsp salt", "1 cangreen beans, drained", "1/4 tsp pepper", "350mL mashed potatoes", "120mL shredded cheese"]
directions: ["In plastic colander, crumble beef.", "Add onion.", "Microwave on High for 6 to 7 minutes (stirring halfway through).", "Drain fat. Add soup, salt and pepper; mix well.", "Microwave on High 3 to 4 minutes.", "Drop potatoes in mounds around edge of bowl.", "Sprinkle with cheese.", "Microwave on High for 3 to 4 minutes.", "Let set for 5 minutes before serving."]

title: Microwave Ravioli Casserole
ingredients: ["60mL cold water", "1 Tbsp all-purpose flour", "240mL beef broth", "2 (430g) cans beef ravioli in sauce", "350 - 470mL cubed, cooked beef", "1 (450g) can cutgreen beans, drained", "1 (90g) can chopped mushrooms, drained", "60mLgrated Parmesan cheese"]
directions: ["In 2-quart casserole, stir water into flour; stir in broth. Micro-cook uncovered until thickened and bubbly, about 5 minutes, stirring after each minute.", "Stir in the ravioli in sauce, beef, beans and mushrooms.", "Micro-cook covered until hot, 7 to 8 minutes, stirring four times.", "Sprinkle cheese on top."]

title: Microwave Recipe For Bacon Stuffed Patties With Mushrooms And
ingredients: ["6 slices bacon", "450g leanground beef", "2 Tbsp bread crumbs", "1 Tbsp parsley flakes", "1 1/2 tsp salt, divided", "1/8 tspgarlic powder", "1/8 tsp pepper", "230g sliced fresh mushrooms", "1 medium onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings", "1 tsp Worcestershire sauce"]
directions: ["Place bacon on several layers of paper towels.", "Cover with paper towel.", "Microwave at High 4 to 6 minutes.", "Set aside. Preheat browning dish 5 minutes.", "Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, parsley flakes, 1 teaspoon salt, garlic powder and pepper. Shape into 8 patties, 1/4-inch thick.", "Crumble bacon.", "Place 1/4 of bacon on center of each of 4 patties.", "Top with remaining patties; press edges to seal.", "Place patties in preheated browning dish.", "Microwave at High 1 1/2 minutes.", "Turn over.", "Microwave 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes, or until not quite desired doneness.", "Remove patties to serving platter.", "Cover and let stand while preparing vegetables.", "Add remaining ingredients to drippings.", "Microwave at High 2 to 4 minutes, or until vegetables are tender, stirring once.", "Spoon over patties.", "Microwave time:", "15 to 19 minutes."]

title: Microwave Red Sausage And Rice
ingredients: ["4 Sausages sliced into rounds", "240mL rice", "470mL Water", "season to taste"]
directions: ["Put all ingredients together into 2 quart glass bowl.", "Cook on High 5-7 minutes or until boiling.", "Put lid on and cook on power level 50 for 20 minutes."]

title: Microwave Red Snapper Delight
ingredients: ["6green onions", "4 large carrots", "2 large red peppers", "2 celery stalks", "1 (2 1/2) lb red snapper", "1 clovegarlic, sliced", "1 Tbsp salad oil", "2 Tbsp dry sherry", "2 Tbsp soy sauce", "1/4 tspgroundginger", "kiwi fruit and almonds (garnish)"]
directions: ["Cut green onions into 2-inch pieces.", "Cut carrots and red peppers into thin strips.", "Slice celery.", "Cut tail of fish and place in 19 x 9-inch baking dish.", "Brush with butter.", "Arrange vegetables around fish.", "In bowl cook garlic and oil on High for 1 1/2 minutes until garlic is golden.", "Discard garlic.", "Add remaining ingredients.", "Pour over fish and vegetables.", "Cook covered on High for 12 to 14 minutes, just until outer edges of fish are opaque, removing lid and stirring vegetables 1/2 way through baking process.", "Garnish with kiwi fruit slices and almonds.", "Makes 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Reuben Meat Loaf

directions: ["Mix first 7 ingredients together, using only 60 mL tomato soup. Place in glass baking dish with glass in center. Mix sauerkraut and 120 mL shredded swiss cheese. Press into meat center about 1 inch. Cover with wax paper. Microwave on medium-high 18 minutes. Let stand for 5-6 minutes. Combine leftover tomato soup and horseradish. Mix well. Spread over Reuben loaf and cook on medium-high for 6-8 minutes. Place cheese triangles on top. Heat for 2-3 minutes, until cheese melts."]

title: Microwave Rice
ingredients: ["350mL rice", "1/2 tsp salt", "710mL water"]
directions: ["Use 1 part rice to 2 parts water.", "Wash rice and drain.", "Add water and salt.", "Cover microwave dish or Pyrex dish with paper towel.", "Place in microwave and cook on High for 18 minutes.", "Let set for 4 to 5 minutes."]

title: Microwave Roast Lamb
ingredients: ["2270g leg or shoulder of lamb", "2 clovesgarlic, split", "1 Tbsp paprika", "salt", "pepper"]
directions: ["Variation:", "Baste with orange juice instead of lamb drippings."]

title: Microwave Roasted Pecans

directions: ["Melt butter in oblong glass dish on High for 30 seconds.", "Add pecans and toss to coat.", "Microwave on High for 3 to 6 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes.", "Drain on paper towel and add salt to taste."]

directions: ["In blender, whirl 40 g granulated sugar at a time at highest speed for a full 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, stopping your blender periodically to push the powdered sugar off the container walls. If you're using a food processor, whirl 80 - 150 g of sugar at a time until powdered."]

title: Microwave Santa Fe Scrambled Eggs

directions: ["Beat the eggs and spices together in a medium bowl. Stir in green pepper, onions and tomato.", "Microwave mixture on High for 3 1/2 to 5 minutes or until the eggs are soft-set, stirring 2 to 3 times during cooking. Sprinkle eggs with Monterey Jack cheese. Cover and let eggs stand for 1 to 2 minutes or until the cheese melts. Makes 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Saucy Baked Eggs
ingredients: ["60mL salsa", "1 egg", "1/4 tsp olive oil", "1 tsp shredded Cheddar cheese"]

title: Microwave Sausage Casserole

directions: ["Place sausage in 12 x 8-inch microwavable dish.", "Microwave on High for 6 to 7 minutes, stirring well after 3 minutes.", "Add onion, green pepper and celery.", "Microwave on High for 3 to 5 minutes. Sprinkle with cheese and microwave an additional 1 to 2 minutes on High."]

title: Microwave Scalloped Corn

directions: ["Combine corn, milk, egg and onion salt in 1 quart casserole. Combine corn flakes crumbs and cheese.", "Spread over corn mixture."]

title: Microwave Scalloped Corn With Ham

directions: ["Soap was made in the 18th century by using lye made by leaching water through ashes in an ash hopper and any fats or greases which were not used for other purposes, such as candles, cooking, etc."]

title: Microwave Scrambled Eggs In A Mug

title: Microwave Shrimp

title: Microwave Shrimp Thermidor

directions: ["Remove crust", "from", "bread.", "Spread butter generously on bread and cut", "into", "1/2-inch", "cubes.", "In a 3-quart casserole, layer 1/2 bread,", "1/2", "shrimp", "and 1/2 cheese.", "Repeat layers. In a small mixing", "bowl, combine eggs, milk, salt and pepper. Pour over ingredients", "in", "casserole.", "Cover and microwave at High 8 minutes."]

title: Microwave Sliced Bake Potatoes
ingredients: ["4 medium potatoes", "2 to 3 Tbsp melted butter", "2 to 3 Tbsp parsley", "4 Tbspgrated Cheddar cheese", "1 1/2 Tbsp Parmesan cheese"]
directions: ["Peel potatoes if skin is tough.", "Cut potatoes into thin slices but", "not", "all", "the way through.", "Put in microwave-safe dish", "and sprinkle with melted butter and parsley.", "Microwave on", "High power 10 minutes; rearrange potatoes after 5 minutes. Let", "rest", "for", "5 minutes.", "Sprinkle with Cheddar and Parmesan cheese.", "Microwave", "4 to", "6 minutes on High until cheeses are melted and potatoes are soft."]

title: Microwave Sloppy Joes
ingredients: ["680gground beef", "160mL finely chopped onion", "120mL diced celery", "60mL dicedgreen pepper", "120mL ketchup", "1 Tbsp Worcestershire sauce", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/8 tsp pepper"]
directions: ["In 1 1/2-quart casserole, crumble beef.", "Add onion, celery and green pepper.", "Cover.", "Microwave on High for 6 minutes.", "Stir after 3 minutes.", "Drain meat well.", "Add to cooked mixture, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, salt and pepper.", "Cover.", "Microwave at High 5 to 6 minutes.", "Stir after 3 minutes or until hot.", "To serve, spoon on buns."]

title: Microwave Smothered Pot Roast
ingredients: ["1130 - 1360g pot roast", "1 can cream of mushroom soup", "1 envelope onion soup", "1 oven cooking bag"]
directions: ["Puncture meat with fork on all sides.", "Spread 1/2 of each soup mix on the bottom of cooking bag.", "Place meat on top.", "Spread rest of soups on top of meat.", "Seal the bag; do not slit any part of bag.", "Place in microwave bowl.", "Let sit about 1/2 hour.", "Place in microwave; cook for 20 minutes per pound at power level 5.", "When halfway through cooking, turn roast around in the bag.", "Reseal."]

title: Microwave Spaghetti Bake
ingredients: ["1 medium onion, chopped", "1 (70g) can sliced mushrooms, drained", "1 Tbsp butter or margarine", "450gground beef", "2 (230g each) cans tomato sauce", "350mL water", "1 1/2 tsp Italian seasoning", "1 tspgarlic salt", "1/4 tsp pepper", "110g uncooked spaghetti, broken in half", "grated Parmesan cheese"]
directions: ["Combine onion, mushrooms and butter in a 2-quart casserole. Microwave on High (100%) for 3 to 4 minutes or until onion is tender.", "Place ground beef in casserole.", "Cover with waxed paper. Microwave on High (100%) for 6 to 8 minutes or until meat is pink in center.", "Stir halfway through cooking.", "Drain off excess fat. Stir in tomato sauce, water, Italian seasoning, garlic salt and pepper.", "Cover. Microwave on High (100%) for 4 to 5 minutes or until hot and bubbly.", "Stir spaghetti noodles into sauce. Cover with a tight fitting lid or plastic wrap.", "Microwave on Medium (50%) for 25 to 30 minutes or until spaghetti is tender. Stir several times during cooking.", "Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving."]

title: Microwave Spaghetti Squash Mexicana
ingredients: ["1 large jar of chunky salsa (mild, medium or hot depending on preference)", "1 (1810g) spaghetti squash"]
directions: ["Pierce squash deeply with knife in 2 places.", "Place on towel in microwave.", "Cook on High 24 to 28 minutes until squash is soft when pressed with fingers.", "Let stand 5 minutes, then cut lengthwise in half.", "Discard seeds.", "Using fork, scrape strands onto serving platter.", "To serve, pour salsa sauce over squash on platter.", "Makes 4 servings.", "Serve with tortilla chips."]

title: Microwave Squash
ingredients: ["5 to 6 small squash, thinly sliced", "1 large onion, thinly sliced", "1/2 stick margarine", "salt and pepper to taste"]
directions: ["Slice squash and onions and place in casserole dish.", "Slice margarine over top and add salt and pepper.", "Cover with wax paper and cook on High until desired doneness, stirring several times during cooking process."]

title: Microwave Stuffed Bell Peppers
ingredients: ["4 large bell peppers", "450gground beef", "1 finely chopped onion", "1 tsp salt", "1/4 tsp pepper", "350mL cooked rice", "1 (450g) can tomato sauce"]
directions: ["Cut peppers in half; wash and remove seed and white membrane. Mix ground beef and onion in 1 1/2-quart casserole and cook at Max power for 5 minutes, stirring once during cooking.", "Stir in salt, pepper, rice and half of the tomato sauce.", "Fill pepper halves with mixture.", "Place in glass dish.", "Top each pepper with remaining sauce.", "Cook, covered, at Max power for 8 to 10 minutes or until peppers are tender.", "Makes 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Stuffed Cabbage
ingredients: ["12 cabbage leaves", "240mL water", "230g hamburger", "230gground sausage", "1 egg", "120mL instant rice", "60mL chopped onion", "1 tspgarlic salt", "1/4 tsp pepper", "dash of hot pepper sauce", "1 can (230g) tomato sauce", "1 can (170g) tomato paste", "1 tsp basil", "1 Tbsp sugar"]
directions: ["Place cabbage and 120 mL water in casserole, cover and microwave 10 minutes.", "Drain.", "Mix meat, egg, rice, onion, spices, pepper sauce and 60 mL of tomato sauce.", "Place 60 mL mixture on each leaf and roll up.", "Mix remaining sauce, paste, water, sugar and basil.", "Pour over rolls and cover.", "Microwave at Medium-high for 25 minutes, moving rolls from center to side halfway through."]

title: Microwave Stuffed Green Peppers
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "120mL instant rice", "1 egg, beaten", "1 medium onion, chopped", "1 (430g) can tomato sauce", "120mL catsup", "1 Tbsp Worcestershire sauce", "1 tsp seasoned salt", "1/4 tsp seasoned pepper", "3 largegreen peppers, cut in half lengthwise", "80mL water", "1 Tbsp sugar"]
directions: ["Power Level:", "Medium-high (70%).", "Total Cooking Time: 20 to 25 minutes.", "Recipe Yield: 4 to 6 servings."]

title: Microwave Stuffed Peppers
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "1 medium onion, finely chopped", "2 cans (230g each) tomato sauce", "60mL water", "3 Tbsp Parmesan cheese", "1 tsp salt", "1/8 tsp pepper", "120mL rice", "4 medium peppers"]
directions: ["Crumble ground beef in medium glass bowl.", "Stir in onion.", "Cook at High 3 1/2 to 4 1/2 minutes or until beef is brown.", "Stir once; drain.", "Stir in 1 can tomato sauce, water, 1 tablespoon cheese, salt and pepper.", "Cook, covered, at High 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 minutes. Stir in rice, let stand, covered, 5 minutes."]

title: Microwave Swedish Crunch
ingredients: ["150g walnut halves", "110g almonds or pecans", "40g butter or margarine", "1 tsp cinnamon (optional)", "1 egg white", "80g sugar", "dash of salt (scant 1/8 tsp)"]
directions: ["Combine walnuts and almonds in 2-quart (12 x 17-inch) glass baking dish.", "Microwave on High for about 2 minutes or until hot. Beat egg white in a small mixing bowl until stiff peaks form. Beat in sugar and salt. Stir in hot nuts. Set aside.", "Place butter in 2-quart (12 x 7-inch) glass baking dish.", "Microwave for about 1 minute on Roast or until melted. Add cinnamon (if desired) to nut mixture and mix.", "Spread nut mixture into melted butter and microwave on Roast for 6 minutes. Stir well and continue cooking on Roast for an additional 5 minutes or until glazed. Stir well and let stand 10 minutes until cool and hardened.", "Break apart and serve."]

title: Microwave Tacos
ingredients: ["450gground beef", "120mL chopped onion", "120mL choppedgreen pepper", "1 clovegarlic, minced", "1 (230g) can tomato sauce", "1 tsp Worcestershire sauce", "1 tsp chili powder", "1/4 tspground red pepper", "1/2 tsp salt", "1 doz commercial taco shells", "710mL shredded lettuce", "2 medium tomatoes, chopped", "350mL (170g) shredded Cheddar cheese", "commercial taco sauce"]
directions: ["Crumble beef into a 1 1/2-quart casserole.", "Add chopped onion, chopped green pepper and minced garlic.", "Cover tightly with heavy-duty plastic wrap; fold back a small edge of wrap to allow steam to escape.", "Microwave at High 6 to 7 minutes, or until beef is browned, stirring every 2 minutes.", "Drain.", "Stir in tomato sauce and next 4 ingredients.", "Cover and microwave at High 3 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.", "Spoon about 2 tablespoons meat mixture into each taco shell.", "Top meat with lettuce, chopped tomato, cheese and taco sauce.", "Serve immediately.", "Yields 12 servings."]

title: Microwave Tangy Turkey Casserole
ingredients: ["1 Tbsp vegetable oil", "1 medium onion, thinly sliced", "60mL tomato paste", "1 tsp oregano", "4 turkey fillets *", "1 clovegarlic, minced", "470mL mushrooms, sliced", "1 (540g) can tomatoes", "1 tsp thyme", "salt and pepper"]
directions: ["In an 8-inch microwave-safe dish, combine oil, garlic and onion.", "Cover and microwave at High for 3 minutes.", "Add mushrooms, tomato paste, tomatoes, thyme and oregano; mix well.", "Place fillets on top of vegetable mixture with thicker ends toward outside.", "Cover and microwave at High for 10 minutes.", "Turn turkey so that less cooked area is toward the outside.", "Cover and microwave at High for 15 minutes.", "Let stand, covered, for 10 minutes.", "Season to taste with salt and pepper."]

title: Microwave Texas Trash
ingredients: ["6 Tbsp butter", "1 tsp seasoned salt", "4 tsp Worcestershire sauce", "470mL corn Chex", "470mL wheat Chex", "470mL rice Chex", "470mL Bugles", "350mL mixed nuts", "240mL thin stick pretzels (optional)"]
directions: ["In a flat microwavable dish place butter, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.", "Microwave on high for 1 minute, or until butter is melted. Stir well.", "Add cereals, nuts, bugles and pretzels, mixing thoroughly to coat.", "Microwave on high for 3 minutes. Stir.", "Microwave on high 3 additional minutes. Let cool and enjoy."]

title: Microwave Toasted Pecans
ingredients: ["150g pecans", "1/4 block margarine stick", "salt"]
directions: ["Spread pecans on microwave-safe plate.", "Cook 3 minutes.", "Stir and add 1/4 stick margarine and salt to taste.", "Toast 2 minutes, then spread on paper towel to cool."]

title: Microwave Toasted Seasoned Pecans
ingredients: ["450g pecan halves", "1 Tbsp seasoned salt", "40g butter or margarine"]
directions: ["Place pecans in 1 1/2-quart microwavable casserole dish. Sprinkle with seasoned salt.", "Cut butter in 8 pieces and space evenly on top of pecans.", "Cook, uncovered, on High for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring once or twice during cooking to distribute butter."]

title: Microwave Tomatoes Parmesan
ingredients: ["2 medium tomatoes", "2 Tbspgrated Parmesan cheese", "2 Tbsp bread crumbs", "1 Tbsp melted butter", "1 tsp chopped chives", "1/8 tsp paprika", "Dash of cayenne pepper"]
directions: ["Cut tomatoes in half and place in a 2-quart glass casserole. Combine the remaining ingredients and spoon over tomatoes.", "Cook on HIGH for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.", "Check for doneness.", "Cook another 4 to 5 minutes, checking often for doneness.", "Makes 4 servings."]

title: Microwave Tuna Stroganoff
ingredients: ["2 (180 - 200g) cans tuna, drained", "1 (300g) can sliced mushrooms with liquid", "cooked noodles", "120mL sour cream", "1 Tbsp chopped parsley"]
directions: ["Combine tuna, soup and mushrooms in 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.", "Heat on full power, 6 to 8 minutes, or until bubbling. Stir twice during heating.", "Stir in sour cream.", "Garnish with parsley if desired and serve over noodles."]

title: Microwave Tuna Wedges
ingredients: ["2 eggs", "6green onions, finely chopped", "150g fine bread crumbs", "1 to 2 tomatoes, cut in wedges", "220g cooked rice", "80g butter", "1/4 tsp thyme", "80ggrated cheese"]
directions: ["In large glass bowl, beat eggs with a fork.", "Add rice, onions and undrained tuna, mixing well.", "Melt butter in microwave, about 1 minute on High.", "Add to tuna along with thyme and crumbs, mixing well.", "Evenly spread mixture in lightly greased 9-inch glass pie plate.", "Cover with wax paper and microwave on High about 9 to 11 minutes, rotating dish halfway after 5 minutes.", "Garnish with cheese and tomato wedges.", "This is great on a hot summer when you have fresh garden tomatoes."]

title: Microwave Turkey Directions
ingredients: ["4540 - 5440g whole turkey or 2490 - 3400g turkey breast", "salt"]
directions: ["Wash turkey.", "Rub with salt, especially inside cavity.", "Place, breast side down, on large microwavable dish.", "Halfway through, turn breast side up and cover leg and wing ends with aluminum foil to prevent overcooking."]

title: Microwave Twice Baked Potato Boats
ingredients: ["4 medium potatoes (140 - 170g each)", "120mL fresh dairy sour cream", "80mL milk", "3 Tbsp butter or margarine, cut up", "2 Tbsp chopped chives", "1 tsp salt", "1/8 tsp freshlyground pepper", "paprika"]
directions: ["Arrange potatoes in a circular pattern on micro-type plate. Use cook cycle and cook 12 to 13 minutes or until tender, turning potatoes over once during cooking.", "Let stand for 5 minutes."]

title: Microwave Vegetable Casserole
ingredients: ["1 (450g) can whole kernel corn", "1 (450g) can cutgreen beans", "1 (280g) can cream of potato soup", "1 (80g) can fried onions", "8 slices American cheese"]
directions: ["Combine corn, green beans and cream of potato soup in 2-quart microwave dish.", "Microwave on High for 5 minutes.", "Cover with onions and cheese.", "Microwave for 2 minutes more or until cheese melts."]

title: Microwave Vegetable Soup
ingredients: ["2 small carrots, chopped finely", "240mL cabbage, shredded fine", "1 stalk celery, chopped finely", "1/2 (280g) box frozen mixed vegetables", "1/3 (280g) box frozen corn", "1 (400 - 450g) can tomatoes", "2 (410g) cans beef broth", "1/2 can tomato soup and 1/2 can water", "2 beef or chicken bouillon cubes", "1 small bay leaf", "1/4 tsp thyme", "1/4 tsp pepper", "salt (at end of cooking as desired)"]
directions: ["Preparation time:", "1 hour.", "Use a 4-quart microwave pot with cover.", "Cook ingredients on High for 20 minutes, stirring at 10 minutes.", "Cook at 50% power for 25 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.", "Taste softness of celery for doneness."]

title: Microwave Veggies
ingredients: ["1 head cauliflower", "450g carrots, sliced", "broccoli (florets)"]
directions: ["On an oval microwavable platter, put head of cauliflower in center of dish; arrange broccoli and carrots around cauliflower nicely.", "Put 4 teaspoons of margarine or butter on top of vegetables; salt and pepper to taste.", "Cover tightly with plastic wrap; poke 2 holes in top.", "Microwave 17 to 19 minutes on High."]

title: Microwave Velveeta Salsa Dip
ingredients: ["450g Velveeta pasteurized process cheese spread, cubed", "1 (230g) jar salsa"]
directions: ["Microwave cheese and salsa in 1 1/2-quart microwavable bowl on High for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted, stirring after 3 minutes.", "Serve hot with assorted, cut up vegetables.", "Makes 450 g."]

title: Microwave Vidalia Onions
ingredients: ["1 Vidalia onion per person", "1 tsp margarine per onion"]
directions: ["Cut out some of center of onion and add one pad of margarine to center.", "Cook for 5 to 10 minutes until done.", "They are sweet and delicious."]

title: Microwave White Squash
ingredients: ["white squash", "lo-fat cheese", "salt", "pepper", "picante sauce"]
directions: ["Select small white squashes no more than 4-inches across.", "Cut into halves at the scalloped edge.", "Place halves into shallow baking pie plate with small amount of water.", "Microwave High power until tender or can be easily pricked with a toothpick."]

title: Microwave Wieners
ingredients: ["120mL honey", "1 (510g) bottle Kraft barbecue sauce", "450g hot dogs, cut up"]
directions: ["Mix honey and barbecue sauce together.", "Microwave on High for 1 minute.", "Add cut up hot dogs.", "Cook 3 minutes on High in 2-quart casserole dish."]

title: Microwave Zucchini Casserole
ingredients: ["600g zucchini, peeled and cut into chunks", "1/2 medium onion, thinly sliced", "4 eggs, beaten", "170g (220g) shredded Cheddar cheese", "60g pimento, drained", "salt and pepper to taste"]
directions: ["Bake zucchini and onion in a greased 10 x 6 x 2-inch microwave dish covered with plastic wrap; turn back corner to vent. Microwave on High for 7 minutes.", "Add remaining ingredients; cover with paper towel and microwave on Medium-high for 8 to 10 minutes. Stir after 3 to 4 minutes."]

title: Microwave Zucchini Stuffing Casserole
ingredients: ["4 medium zucchini, sliced (1420mL)", "180mL shredded carrots", "120mL chopped onion", "470mL stuffing", "1 can cream of chicken soup", "120mL sour cream"]
directions: ["Cook zucchini in microwave for 8 minutes.", "Add carrots and onion.", "Cook for 4 more minutes.", "Stir in stuffing, saving some to sprinkle on top.", "Also, stir in the sour cream.", "Cook 4 more minutes or until hot."]

title: Microwaved Cauliflower Au Gratin
ingredients: ["1 medium head cauliflower (about 450g)", "2 Tbsp butter", "2 Tbsp flour", "1/4 tsp white pepper", "1/4 tsp dry mustard", "salt and pepper to taste", "240mL milk", "240mL sharp Cheddar cheese,grated"]
directions: ["Remove outer leaves from cauliflower and trim stem close to base.", "Wash and place cauliflower on a 9-inch pie plate.", "Cover with plastic wrap and microwave on High 6 to 8 minutes.", "Let stand while making cheese sauce.", "Melt butter 1 minute on High.", "Blend in flour and seasonings.", "Stir in milk and microwave on High 2 to 3 minutes or until thickened, stirring every minute.", "Add cheese and stir to blend.", "Place cauliflower on serving plate and pour sauce over top.", "Serve at once.", "Makes 6 to 8 servings."]

title: Microwaved Chicken
ingredients: ["4 or 6 skinned, bone in or out chicken breasts", "salt and pepper to taste", "120mL water"]
directions: ["Arrange the chicken breasts in a large Corning Ware dish that has been spread with margarine.", "Tilt lid for first 6 minutes. Add the water at the beginning. Cover completely and cook 8 more minutes or until done. Turn dish once during cooking."]

title: Microwaved Chicken Breast
ingredients: ["150g coarsely crushed potato chips", "1 Tbsp chopped parsley", "1/2 tsp paprika", "1/2 tsp salt (optional)", "1/4 tsp onion powder", "4 chicken breasts (skinless and boneless)", "2 Tbsp mayonnaise"]
directions: ["On waxed paper, combine crushed potato chips, parsley, paprika, salt and onion powder.", "Brush chicken with mayonnaise, then coat with chip mixture.", "In a 12 x 8-inch baking dish, cook chicken covered with a paper towel on High in microwave 8 to 10 minutes or until done.", "Rearrange chicken halfway through cooking time.", "This can be made with flavored chips such as barbecue, Cheddar cheese or hot jalapeno, if daring."]

title: Microwaved Chicken Breasts
ingredients: ["3 large chicken breasts, boned, skinned and halved lengthwise", "6 slices thinly sliced boiled ham", "6 thin slices Swiss or American cheese", "2 Tbsp butter or margarine", "1 (300g) can cream of mushroom soup", "1 (90g) can sliced mushrooms, drained", "2 Tbsp milk", "snipped parsley"]
directions: ["Pound chicken breasts with wooden mallet between 2 pieces of waxed paper until about 1/4-inch thick.", "Place ham and cheese on each.", "Tuck in sides and roll up as for jelly roll.", "Skewer with toothpicks."]

title: Microwaved Cinnamon Toasted Pecans
ingredients: ["150g pecan halves", "1 Tbsp margarine", "40g sugar", "1/2 tsp cinnamon", "1/4 tsp nutmeg"]
directions: ["Melt butter and pour over pecans.", "Mix sugar and spices and mix with buttered pecans.", "Spread on paper plate.", "Microwave 1 1/2 minutes."]

title: Microwaved Corn Pudding
ingredients: ["1 Tbsp margarine, melted", "1 beaten egg", "1 Tbsp plain flour", "1 tsp sugar", "1/8 tsp salt", "1 can cream-style corn", "60mL milk"]
directions: ["Combine all ingredients with milk being added last.", "Microwave on High for 8 minutes."]

title: Microwaved Mashed Potatoes
ingredients: ["3 to 4 medium potatoes, peeled and cubed", "60mL water", "1/2 stick margarine", "30 - 60mL milk (use more or less for desired consistency)"]
directions: ["In microwave bowl with lid (my preference is clear Pyrex), place potatoes with water.", "Cook on full power for 13 minutes, stirring thoroughly once halfway through cooking time.", "Place margarine in bowl; leave covered for 3 to 4 minutes.", "Mash potatoes well.", "Add milk slowly for desired consistency.", "Serve with more margarine, salt and pepper.", "Serves family of 5 well."]

title: Microwaved Mixed Veggies
ingredients: ["2 tsp margarine", "2 thinly sliced zucchini", "2 sliced tomatoes", "1 small sliced onion", "garlic powder", "basil", "2 Tbsp shredded low-fat Mozzarella cheese (if desired)"]
directions: ["Melt margarine in microwave dish.", "Add zucchini and microwave for 3 minutes.", "Stir in tomatoes, onion, some garlic powder and basil.", "Cover and microwave until tomatoes are tender.", "Sprinkle with cheese, if desired."]

title: Microwaved Pizza Franks
ingredients: ["1/2 tspgarlic powder", "1 (230g) can tomato sauce", "1/2 tsp oregano leaves", "1/8 tsp dried basil", "salt and pepper", "8 franks", "8 buns"]
directions: ["Place franks in buns.", "Mix remaining ingredients well.", "Top each frank with 2 tablespoons of sauce.", "Place prepared buns in 18 x 8 x 2-inch glass baking dish.", "Sprinkle each with shredded Mozzarella cheese.", "Cover with waxed paper.", "Microwave 3 minutes on High or until cheese melts."]

title: Microwaved Scalloped Potatoes
ingredients: ["1 can cream of chicken soup", "1 small onion, diced", "6 medium potatoes", "5 slices Velveeta cheese", "240mL milk", "2 tsp butter"]
directions: ["Slice potatoes and put in casserole dish. Blend soup, milk, onion and butter and pour over potatoes. Cook on High 19 to 24 minutes. Stir every 4 to 5 minutes and last 2 minutes, put cheese on top to melt. Cook, covered, but remove lid when cheese is added. Standing time 5 minutes."]

title: Microwaved Stuffed Peppers
ingredients: ["5green peppers, seeded", "340gground beef", "240mL quick rice", "60mL chopped onion", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/4 tsp pepper", "1/4 tspgarlic powder", "230g tomato sauce", "5 slices sharp cheese"]
directions: ["Combine beef, rice, onion and seasonings.", "Fill peppers; place in a 10-inch microwave pie plate.", "Pour tomato sauce over.", "Cover with plastic wrap.", "Cook on High for 20 to 22 minutes or until peppers are tender and meat is no longer red.", "Remove plastic; top with cheese slices.", "Re-cover and let stand for 10 minutes before serving."]

title: Microwaved Yam
ingredients: ["1 large yam"]
directions: ["Cut yam in two.", "Prick with fork or paring knife.", "Microwave on High for 8 to 10 minutes, turning every 2 minutes.", "When done, wrap in foil and let it steam until needed.", "Serves 2."]

title: Microwaving Cabbage Rolls
ingredients: ["8 large cabbage leaves", "120mL water", "450g leanground beef", "240mL cooked rice", "60mL chopped onion", "1 egg", "1 tsp salt", "1/4 tsp pepper", "1 (300g) condensed tomato soup", "1 (230g) can sauerkraut, drained (optional)", "toothpicks"]
directions: ["Place cabbage and water in large bowl.", "Cover with plastic wrap.", "Microwave for 5 minutes on High to soften.", "Mix ground beef, rice, onion, egg, salt, pepper and 2 tablespoons soup. Divide among cabbage leaves.", "Fold in sides.", "Roll up and secure with toothpicks.", "Place cabbage rolls, seam side down, in 12 x 18-inch baking dish.", "Mix remaining soup and sauerkraut; pour over cabbage rolls.", "Cover dish loosely with plastic wrap.", "Microwave 12 to 17 minutes on High, turning dish once.", "Yields 4 servings."]

title: One Pan Pizza
ingredients: ["470mL Bisquick", "160mL milk", "2 eggs", "240mL cut-up pepperoni", "470mL (110g) shredded Mozzarella cheese", "120mL choppedgreen bell pepper", "120mL chopped onion", "1 tspgarlic salt", "240mL pizza sauce", "1 tsp dried oregano leaves (optional)", "1 tsp dried basil leaves (optional)", "1 can mushrooms, chopped (optional)"]
directions: ["Grease a 12 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.", "Mix Bisquick, milk and eggs in dish with a fork until batter is of uniform color (will be lumpy).", "Stir in pepperoni, 240 mL cheese, green pepper, onion, oregano, basil and garlic salt.", "Spread evenly.", "Bake until top is light brown (about 30 minutes).", "Spread with pizza sauce. Sprinkle with mushrooms and 240 mL cheese.", "Bake just until cheese is melted (about 1 to 2 minutes)."]

title: One Pan Pork Chop And Cabbage
ingredients: ["1 head cabbage", "4 to 5 pork chops", "1 Tbsp rosemary seed", "salt", "pepper"]
directions: ["Fry pork chops in large pan or electric skillet until browned. Take chops out.", "Add finely shredded cabbage to pan and rosemary. Place chops on top of cabbage.", "Cover and let cook on medium heat.", "Stir cabbage occasionally.", "Cook until cabbage is reduced down and fully cooked.", "Chops will be tender."]

title: One Pan Pork Chops
ingredients: ["3 to 8 pork chops (any cut)", "several medium sized potatoes", "1 can cream of mushroom soup", "2 Tbsp cooking oil", "salt and pepper", "paprika", "garlic", "onion powder"]
directions: ["Wash sliced potatoes.", "Brown pork chops in oil.", "Add potatoes, mushroom soup and milk to get consistency of gravy.", "Cover and simmer for 40 to 60 minutes or until chops are tender.", "Time varies with cut of chops."]

title: One Pot Chicken Dish
ingredients: ["2 to 3 Tbsp butter or margarine", "450g chicken, diced", "1 onion, chopped", "1 bell pepper, chopped", "2 to 3 slices cooked ham, diced (optional)", "470mL regular rice", "1 can chicken broth"]
directions: ["Melt butter in a large skillet.", "Brown chicken on all sides. Then add onion and bell pepper.", "Cook for a few minutes (4 to 5) until onion and bell pepper are soft.", "Next add the ham, rice and chicken broth.", "Add enough water to cover the rice.", "Cover and cook over low-medium heat for about 45 minutes.", "Stir the mixture often.", "More water may need to be added to keep the rice from sticking."]

title: One Pot Country Chicken
ingredients: ["1 1360g fryer", "120mL frozen peas", "1 large sliced onion", "1 large sliced pepper", "4 medium peeled, sliced potatoes", "1 beef bouillon dissolved in 180mL hot water"]
directions: ["Brown chicken in oil, salt and pepper.", "Sprinkle with paprika, let stand for 5 minutes.", "Saute onion and pepper in skillet.", "Arrange potatoes in single layer over sauteed veggies. Salt and pepper.", "Arrange chicken over potatoes and pour dissolved bouillon over.", "Cook on low heat for 30 minutes.", "Sprinkle peas around chicken.", "Cover and simmer until chicken and peas are done."]

title: One Pot Dinner
ingredients: ["450g hamburger", "230 - 450g bacon", "2 cans pork and beans", "1 can kidney beans", "1 can lima beans", "1 chopped onion", "240mL ketchup", "3 Tbsp white vinegar", "1 Tbsp liquid smoke"]
directions: ["Brown hamburger, bacon and onion together.", "Mix all ingredients in crock-pot and cook on low up to 4 to 9 hours."]

title: One Pot Dinner #1
ingredients: ["240mL quick cooking rice", "180g can tuna", "1 tsp salt", "2 tsp margarine", "2 tsp dried onion", "240mL water"]
directions: ["Combine all ingredients in a pot.", "Bring to a boil.", "Simmer 15 minutes or until cooked through."]

title: One Pot Pork Chop Supper
ingredients: ["4 pork chops", "1 can tomato soup", "120mL water", "1 tsp Worcestershire sauce", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp oregano", "6 to 8 small whole potatoes", "4 small carrots"]
directions: ["In a large skillet, brown chops. Pour off fat. Split the carrots lengthwise and cut in 2-inch pieces. Add all the ingredients to the pork chops. Cover and simmer 45 minutes."]

title: One Skillet Dinner
ingredients: ["450gground beef or turkey", "1 Tbsp oil", "470mL medium noodles (uncooked)", "120 - 180mLgrated Swiss or Cheddar cheese", "2 (230g) cans tomato sauce", "1/2 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp basil", "1/2 tsp pepper", "2 tsp chopped parsley"]
directions: ["Cook crumbled meat in oil in skillet over high heat until browned.", "Stir in uncooked noodles, tomato sauce, salt, basil and pepper.", "Cover; cook over low heat for 20 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally.", "Sprinkle with cheese.", "Cover; heat for 2 minutes, or until cheese melts.", "Sprinkle with parsley."]

title: One Step Microwave Lasagna
ingredients: ["450gground chuck", "120mL water", "1 tsp salt", "470mL drained Ricotta cheese", "120mLgrated Parmesan cheese", "parsley", "2 (440g) jars meatless spaghetti sauce", "230g uncooked lasagna noodles", "710mL shredded Mozzarella cheese", "120mL Romano cheese"]
directions: ["Cook beef until brown and drain well.", "Stir in spaghetti sauce, water and salt, blending well.", "Arrange 1/3 of sauce in 8 x 12-inch microwave baking dish.", "Cover with half the uncooked noodles. Spread with 240 mL Ricotta (mixed with chopped parsley, if desired), sprinkle with half the remaining cheeses.", "Repeat with second layer and top with remaining 1/3 sauce.", "Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese.", "Cover with double thickness of plastic wrap.", "Cook on Medium (50% power) for 30 to 35 minutes. Sprinkle top with additional Mozzarella and Parmesan cheese.", "Cook on medium about 2 minutes or until cheeses melt.", "Sprinkle with parsley and serve.", "Yields 8 servings."]

title: Pasta Carbonara
ingredients: ["450g bacon", "150g mushrooms, sliced", "1 clovegarlic", "1green pepper, cubed", "2 eggs", "80ggrated cheese", "2 Tbsp fresh parsley", "450g spaghetti"]
directions: ["Take 450 g of bacon and cut into cubes; brown.", "Add 240 mL sliced mushrooms, garlic and green pepper; saute with bacon.", "Set aside and save fat in pan.", "In a spaghetti bowl, beat 2 eggs.", "Add parsley and grated cheese.", "Cook 450 g of spaghetti.", "Save 120 mL of water.", "Fold spaghetti into egg mixture.", "Let set 3 minutes.", "Add 120 mL of boiling water; mix well.", "Heat first mixture of bacon and vegetables; pour over spaghetti."]

title: Pasta Chicken

directions: ["Layer in skillet the ingredients.", "Add a little water.", "Cover and simmer on low to medium heat for 30 to 40 minutes.", "Cook hot peppers separately and for those who like hot peppers, stir them in at the table."]

title: Zucchini, Eggplant Ratatouille
ingredients: ["2 medium eggplant, diced", "2 yellow squash, diced", "2 medium zucchini, diced", "1green pepper, diced", "60mL olive oil", "1 medium onion, diced", "4 clovesgarlic, minced", "230g tomatoes, chopped", "60mL parsley, minced", "8 fresh basil leaves, minced", "1 tsp salt", "1/2 tsp pepper", "1/4 tsp oregano"]
directions: ["Cut", "eggplant, yellow squash, zucchini and peppers into 1/2-inch cubes.", "Heat oil in large skillet and saute onion and garlic", "until", "onion is tender.", "Add vegetables and stir for 2 to 3", "minutes.", "Add", "remaining", "ingredients.", "Heat to boiling point and reduce heat.", "Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender, 30 to 40 minutes.", "Makes 6 to 8 servings."]

title: Zucchini, Onion And Carrot Saute
ingredients: ["4 zucchini (about 450g)", "240mL thinly diagonally sliced carrots", "470mL thinly sliced onions", "1 tsp salt", "1 tsp pepper", "1 tsp dried basil leaves, crushed", "60mL pure olive oil"]
directions: ["Tip:", "Yellow summer squash may be used for part of the zucchini."]

title: Zucchini, Peppers And Tomatoes
ingredients: ["450g zucchini (approximately 830mL), sliced", "salt", "2 Tbsp butter", "1 Tbsp oil", "240mL sliced onions", "240mL slicedgreen peppers", "350mL peeled, seeded, chopped tomatoes", "1/2 tsp basil", "1/4 tsp oregano", "pepper", "60mL Parmesan cheese (optional)"]
directions: ["Wash, trim and slice the zucchini.", "Salt and let drain; pat dry.", "Heat the butter and oil and saute the onions until wilted. Add the zucchini and peppers and cook 2 to 3 minutes.", "Stir in the Parmesan cheese if you like.", "Serve either hot or cold.", "Serves 4 to 6."]

title: Zucchini, Turnips And Carrots In Butter
ingredients: ["2 small zucchini", "2 medium white turnips, peeled", "2 carrots, trimmed and scraped", "salt", "pepper", "3 Tbsp butter", "2 Tbsp chopped shallots"]
directions: ["Cut ends off zucchini.", "Cut into 1/4-inch thick slices.", "Stack slices and cut into 1/4-inch wide julienne strips.", "Prepare turnips and carrots in same manner.", "Put carrots in saucepan; add water to cover.", "Bring to boil and simmer 2 minutes.", "Add turnips and simmer 1 minute more.", "Drain well.", "Melt butter in heavy skillet and add zucchini, carrots,", "turnips and shallots.", "Season to taste.", "Cook, tossing and stirring, about 2 to 3 minutes.", "Do not overcook.", "Serve hot.", "Serves 4."]
